title: Roasted Turnip with Crunchy Tadka
description: A simple and flavorful side dish featuring roasted turnip topped with a crunchy tadka. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Peel and chop the turnip into 1-inch cubes.
Toss the turnip with 1 tablespoon of oil and season with salt and pepper.
Spread the turnip on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
While the turnip is roasting, heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the tadka to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy.
Sprinkle the crunchy tadka over the roasted turnip.
Serve hot and garnish with additional crunchy tadka if desired.
